content:
“我是画家皮克曼，能有幸邀请您，成为我的模特吗？”
“我在你的身上看到了前所未有的景象……让我靠近一点……让我再多看一点！”

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"I am Painter Pickman. May I have the honor of inviting you to be my model?"
"I see an unprecedented scene in you... Let me get a little closer... Let me see a bit more!"

content:
《艺术娱报》，只报猛料：
本期，我们跟踪采访的是“刻画真实世界的写实主义者”皮克曼。

✦他是天才，是异类，是被社会所排斥的癌细胞般的极端存在；
✦谩骂也好，夸赞也罢，最终都会变成他画布上的艳丽色彩。
✦据说他的画拥有模糊真实与虚假的神奇魔力，进入画中的人将看见世界的真相！

订阅《艺术娱报》，小编将陆续为大家揭晓皮克曼与其画中的秘密，下面是第一期报道：

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Art & Scandal Gazette，we only break the big ones.
In this issue, we track an interview with Pickman, the "realist who depicts the true world."

✦He is a genius, an outlier, an extreme existence like a cancer cell rejected by society;
✦Whether it's insults or praise, in the end, they will all become the vibrant colors on his canvas.
✦It is said that his paintings possess a magical power that blurs the line between reality and illusion; those who enter the painting will see the Hidden Truth of the world!

Subscribe to "Art & Scandal Gazette", and our editor will gradually reveal the secrets of Pickman and his paintings. Here is the first issue report:
